alexa_plugin.name: Alexa Plugin
alexa_plugin.description: Connect AION to Amazon Alexa for voice-triggered commands and smart home integration.

anthropic_provider.name: Anthropic Provider
anthropic_provider.description: Use Claude models (claude-3-5-sonnet, claude-opus, etc.) as AION's AI backend.

audio_pipeline.name: Audio Pipeline
audio_pipeline.description: Text-to-speech and speech-to-text pipeline. Converts AION responses to audio and transcribes voice input.

audio_transcriber.name: Audio Transcriber
audio_transcriber.description: Transcribe audio files to text using faster-whisper (local, no API key required).

character_manager.name: Character Manager
character_manager.description: Manage AION's character profile — name, personality traits, and behavioral guidelines.

claude_cli_provider.name: Claude CLI Provider
claude_cli_provider.description: Route AION requests through the Claude CLI for enhanced context and tool use.

deepseek_provider.name: DeepSeek Provider
deepseek_provider.description: Use DeepSeek models (deepseek-chat, deepseek-reasoner) as AION's AI backend.

desktop.name: Desktop Automation
desktop.description: Full desktop automation — mouse control, keyboard input, screenshots, and clipboard access via pyautogui.

discord_bot.name: Discord Bot
discord_bot.description: Connect AION to a Discord server as a bot. Supports slash commands and channel messaging.

docx_tool.name: DOCX Creator
docx_tool.description: Create and edit Word documents (.docx) from AION responses or structured content.

focus_manager.name: Focus Manager
focus_manager.description: Persistent task focus — injects the current focus goal into every AION turn for sustained attention.

gemini_provider.name: Gemini Provider
gemini_provider.description: Use Google Gemini models (gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-2.5-pro, etc.) as AION's AI backend.

grok_provider.name: Grok Provider
grok_provider.description: Use xAI Grok models as AION's AI backend.

heartbeat.name: Heartbeat
heartbeat.description: Periodic self-check — AION logs a heartbeat at configurable intervals to confirm it is running.

image_search.name: Image Search
image_search.description: Search the web for images and return URLs. Supports Google and Bing image search.

mcp_client.name: MCP Client
mcp_client.description: Connect to external MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers to extend AION with third-party tools.

moltbook.name: Moltbook
moltbook.description: Integration with the Moltbook platform for content creation and social media automation.

mood_engine.name: Mood Engine
mood_engine.description: Dynamic mood system — AION's personality adapts based on context, time, and recent interactions.

multi_agent.name: Multi-Agent Router
multi_agent.description: Spin up parallel sub-agents for complex multi-step tasks. AION delegates and aggregates results.

ollama_provider.name: Ollama Provider
ollama_provider.description: Use local Ollama models (llama3, mistral, etc.) as AION's AI backend — fully offline.

playwright_browser.name: Playwright Browser
playwright_browser.description: Headless browser automation via Playwright. Browse, click, fill forms, and extract web content.

proactive.name: Proactive Memory
proactive.description: Proactive memory analysis — AION surfaces relevant past context without being asked.

slack_bot.name: Slack Bot
slack_bot.description: Integrate AION into Slack workspaces. Responds to mentions and direct messages.

telegram_bot.name: Telegram Bot
telegram_bot.description: Send and receive messages via Telegram. AION can notify you and respond to commands from any device.
